name: Grim Creeper
description: Grim Creeper is a reaper who is one of the Core Undead Skylanders in Skylanders: Swap Force. He is available in the Arkeyan Crossbow Battle Pack.
biography: When he was young, Grim Creeper visited the prestigious Grim Acres School for Ghost Wrangling, hoping to attend as a student. But when the Scaremaster interviewed him, he found that Grim didn't have any of the usual training that other students had. Because of this, he was turned away. However, as the young Grim was about to leave, a herd of rampaging ghosts suddenly flooded the school -- carrying away the faculty and leaving the students to fend for themselves. Grim Creeper stood his ground -- not only defending the other students, but using his amazing reaping talents to fight back the ghosts and contain them until help could arrive. Now a Skylander, Grim is considered one of the best reapers ever to swing a scythe, proving that studies alone are no substitute for bravery, passion and true heroic spirit.
personality: Grim Creeper may be grim by name and nature, but this reaper is passionate about fighting evil and will always be a hero through and through. He stands his ground whatever the situation.

story.content: For his first mission, Grim Creeper was assigned to help Eruptor and Slam Bam at The Frost Seas. After saving an exedition camp from a group of Cyclopses lead by Bloodshot, he and the two other Skylanders came upon a tunnel that lead to what remained of a frozen kingdom. Master Eon soon appeared and explained that the kingdom belonged to King Nefarion, a wicked being who terrorized Skylands with the Mask of Power. Suddenly, strange changes began to occur, as Kaos had made his way to the past and began changing history. Before their eyes, Professor Splinters morphed into a servant of Kaos, affected by the time change, and Master Eon quickly sent Grim Creeper, Eruptor and Slam Bam to the past to stop Kaos.

content: Time To cut and run! - when transforming
My spirit is lifted! - level up
My stats are creeping up! - stats
This hat can ruin my image. - given a hat
Now that's a skull cap! - given a hat
I go by many names! - nickname

trivia: His name is a play on the name of the undead entity, 'Grim Reaper'.
Both Grim Creeper and Hood Sickle are both based on the Grim Reaper.

He is the second Undead Skylander to have a ghostly ally while Cynder is the first. However, he must defeat an enemy in order to summon it. Also, killing a Chompy or a Chompy Pod won't summon ghostly allies.
His abilities are similar to Ignitor as they can leave their suits.
Grim Creeper is voiced by Lex Lang, best known as the current voice of Dr. Neo Cortex from Crash Bandicoot.
When wearing a hat, and performing Ghost Form, the hat stays with his Ghost Form and not his Living Armor.
His living armor slightly resembles Gregg the Grim Reaper from Conker's Bad Fur Day.
If Grim Creeper chooses the Spooky Specter path, he is one of the Undead Skylanders with the ability to heal himself after attacking his enemies.
Grim Creeper was orignally called 'Grimm Streaker'.
His Ghost Form slightly resembles the ghosts from the Darklight Crypt level of the first game, including Machine Ghost from Skylanders: Giants.
Due to having a sky blue color, Grim Creeper's ghost form also resembles that of Malladus from Legend of Zelda: Spirit Tracks.
His Soul Gem, Help From Beyond, adds a mist that follows him.
His regular figure form lacks black pupils within his blue eyes.
If you look really closely inside Grim Creeper's hood-like helmet, you'll notice a skull after he goes into Ghost Form. However, that only happens after all of his basic upgrades have been purchased.
He somewhat resembles the Nethers from Ratchet & Clank: Into the Nexus as he is a ghost that wears a dark suit of protective armor. Unlike the Nethers, he can survive without his armor.
He is one of the few Undead Skylanders to have armor (others being Chop Chop, Eye-Brawl, and Krypt King).

trailers.name: Skylanders Swap Force - Meet the Skylanders - Grim Creeper (Your Time is Up)
Skylanders Swap Force - Grim Creeper Soul Gem Preview (Your Time Is Up)
Meet the Skylanders LightCore Grim Creeper

gameplay: Grim Creeper uses a ghostly scythe for primary attacks and can separate from his armor in Ghost Form. In Ghost Form, he can mark enemies for the Living Armor to attack. He is capable of knocking enemies into the air with spinning spectral attacks and can choose between mastering his scythe style or enhancing his spectral tactics to heal himself. On the 3DS, he gains additional powers like Fear Scream and Armor Spectral Scythe Spin as he levels up.

basic.name: Scythe Swing
basic.content: Press Attack 1 to swing a ghostly scythe at nearby enemies.

basic.name: Ghost Form
basic.content: Press Attack 2 to separate from the armor. Touch up to two enemies while in Ghost Form to mark them. Press Attack 2 again to attack them with the Living Armor.

basic_upgrades.name: Poltergeist Scythe
basic_upgrades.content: Press Attack 3 to knock enemies into the air with a spinning spectral scythe.

basic_upgrades.name: Spirit Scythe
basic_upgrades.content: Press Attack 1 to swing a more powerful scythe that does increased damage.

basic_upgrades.name: Spook and Destroy
basic_upgrades.content: Press Attack 2 to go into Ghost Form and leave behind Living Armor. Touch up to five enemies while in the Ghost Form to mark them. Press Attack 2 again to attack them with Living Armor.

basic_upgrades.name: Armored Amore
basic_upgrades.content: Living Armor does increased damage when it flies back to Grim Creeper. Those pointy boots hurt!

soulgems.name: Help From Beyond
soulgems.content: A ghost ally appears from defeated enemies that will seek out and attack other nearby enemies.

abilities.name: Sphere of Fear
abilities.content: Hold Attack 3 for a short time to spin the scythe in a larger area and repeatedly hit enemies into the air.

abilities.name: Grave Danger
abilities.content: Critical Hit is increased. Concentrated ghost particles make it easier to do more damage to enemies.

abilities.name: Ghastly Damage
abilities.content: All attacks do increased damage for a short time after enemies are hit by the Living Armor.

abilities.name: It's Alive!
abilities.content: Press Attack 2 to go into Ghost Form and leave behind Living Armor. Living Armor will attack nearby enemies when it is attacked.

abilities.name: Haunted Help
abilities.content: Press Attack 2 to go into Ghost Form and leave behind Living Armor. Enemies between Ghost Form and the Living Armor take damage.

abilities.name: Soul Sampler
abilities.content: Regain some health for each enemy hit by Spook and Destroy.
